response.justification: While Bogdan meets the 15-year engineering experience requirement and has a strong background in full-stack development and open-source projects, his profile lacks the Director-level strategic leadership required for this role. His AI experience appears to be a very recent addition rather than the 'recognized expertise' needed to advise enterprise customers and drive high-level AI strategy.
strengths: Over 15 years of diverse software engineering experience across web, mobile, and infrastructure.
Entrepreneurial initiative demonstrated by founding and maintaining an open-source Geo-Data platform.
Solid builder fluency with recent hands-on exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP.
concerns: Lacks the Director-level technical leadership and strategic influence expected for a Principal Engineer.
AI experience is very recent and does not demonstrate the 'recognized expertise' preferred for the role.
No evidence of advising strategic enterprise customers or partners on cloud and AI adoption.
